description: Create a self-contained Foundry project fixture at tests/fixtures/project/ that serves as the canonical test workspace for all integration tests, mirroring the Go CLI's test/testdata/project/ directory with the same Solidity contracts, compiler settings, and config structure.

userStories.title: Fixture Project Skeleton and Configuration Files
userStories.description: As a test author, I want a tests/fixtures/project/ directory with all configuration files (foundry.toml, treb.toml, .env.example, remappings.txt, .gitignore, script/deploy/.gitkeep) so that integration tests have a canonical project skeleton to operate on.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/fixtures/project/ directory exists with foundry.toml, treb.toml, .env.example, remappings.txt, .gitignore
foundry.toml has bytecode_hash = "none" and cbor_metadata = false
foundry.toml has anvil-31337 and anvil-31338 RPC endpoints using ports 8545 and 9545
treb.toml has [accounts.anvil] with Anvil's well-known private key (0xac0974...)
script/deploy/.gitkeep exists
remappings.txt has entries for forge-std/ and @openzeppelin/contracts/
cargo check --workspace passes

userStories.title: Solidity Source Contracts
userStories.description: As a test author, I want all 7 Solidity source contracts (Counter, SampleToken, StringUtils, StringUtilsV2, UpgradeableCounter, MessageStorageV07, MessageStorageV08) matching the Go CLI's fixtures so that integration tests cover all key deployment patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 Solidity source files exist in tests/fixtures/project/src/
Counter.sol has setNumber() and increment() functions with pragma =0.8.30
SampleToken.sol has a constructor taking (string, string, uint256) with pragma ^0.8.30
StringUtils.sol and StringUtilsV2.sol provide concat, length, toUpperCase, equal external functions with pragma ^0.7.0 || ^0.8.0
UpgradeableCounter.sol has initialize(), increment(), getCount(), owner(), transferOwnership() with pragma =0.8.30
MessageStorageV07.sol imports StringUtils (pragma =0.7.6) and MessageStorageV08.sol imports StringUtilsV2 (pragma =0.8.30)
cargo check --workspace passes

userStories.title: Library Stubs and Compilation Verification
userStories.description: As a test author, I want minimal vendored library stubs for forge-std and openzeppelin-contracts plus a Deploy.s.sol script and a compilation test so that the fixture compiles without external dependency installation.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/forge-std/src/Script.sol exists with Vm interface, console library, and Script base contract
lib/openzeppelin-contracts/ contains minimal proxy contract stubs (ERC1967Proxy, TransparentUpgradeableProxy, BeaconProxy, UpgradeableBeacon)
script/Deploy.s.sol deploys Counter using forge-std Script base
fixture_compile.rs test exists with #[ignore] attribute and passes when forge is available
Library stubs are minimal — only declarations needed for compilation, no real logic
cargo check --workspace passes

userStories.title: Wire Fixture into Test Framework and Smoke Test
userStories.description: As a test author, I want the test framework to recognize the project fixture as the primary integration test fixture with smoke tests verifying workdir structure, port rewriting, and config copying so that the full test pipeline is validated.
acceptanceCriteria: DEFAULT_FIXTURE constant is defined as "project" in workdir.rs
fixture_workdir_structure test passes: all expected files are present in the temp workspace
fixture_foundry_toml_port_rewrite test passes: port rewriting works correctly for both anvil-31337 and anvil-31338 endpoints
fixture_treb_toml_present test passes: treb.toml is copied and contains expected account config
Symlinked items (lib/, remappings.txt, .gitignore) resolve correctly in the temp workspace
All tests pass with cargo test --workspace
